SavedJourney.title: SavedJourney
SavedJourney.description: A curated heritage journey and travel plan saved by the authenticated user.

id.description: The unique identifier of the saved journey document.

createdAt.description: The timestamp of when the journey was saved.

params.description: The parameters submitted to curate this journey.

journey.description: The full curated JourneyResponse object returned by the model.

/users/{userId}/journeys/{journeyId}.description: Collection of curated slow travel itineraries saved by individual users.
